ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the company belongs to */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the company's CEO */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Revenue growth rate of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity of the company */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the company */,
  "interest_coverage_ratio" REAL /* Interest coverage ratio of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the portfolio (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist position */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the company was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_positions_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_positions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
